title: Executive dashboard
subtitle: Sales KPIs, trends, and operational snapshot for the selected period.
no_widgets: No dashboard modules are available for your account.

home.welcome_subtitle: You do not have the executive dashboard role; open a module below.
home.shortcuts_hint: Shortcuts match your permissions — the same links as the sidebar.
home.no_shortcuts: No modules are available for your account. Contact an administrator.

error.load: Could not load executive KPIs. Try again.

filters.title: Period & branch
filters.hint: Filters apply to sales-based metrics. Loyalty accruals use the same dates globally.

kpi.revenue_hint: Total posted sales in the selected period. Sparkline: last days in the range. Click the card to open invoices (if you have access).
kpi.margin_hint: Gross margin ratio (sales minus standard product cost, as a % of sales). Not a cash profit figure—use income statement for full P&L.
kpi.orders_hint: Count of posted sales invoices in the period (one invoice = one order).
kpi.avg_ticket_hint: Revenue ÷ posted invoice count for the period (average sale size).
kpi.loyalty_hint: Loyalty points earned from purchases in the period (system-wide; not limited to the branch filter).

charts.revenue_trend_hint: Daily gross sales from posted POS invoices. Y-axis is currency (compact). X-axis is the day bucket. Use to spot pace vs. prior days in the same range.
charts.category_mix_hint: Share of revenue by product category in the period. Use it to see concentration risk and where to focus merchandising or promos.

tables.top_products_hint: By revenue in the period. No deep link—use as a shortlist to restock or promote.
tables.recent_po_hint: Latest POs for supplier follow-up (not the same as POS sales).
